posts.author: elitemmapicks
posts.content:
Predictions: 4 of 4 Pending
|
Tied for 1st with 510 others

Belal Muhammad vs Gabriel Bonfim
Pick: Bonfim via decision
26% of Tapology users (78 users) are picking Bonfim (58% decision)
Bonfim is 9.1 years younger (28.8 vs 37.9)
Both fighters have 72” reach
Bonfim has +0.93 strike differential/min vs +0.61
Bonfim has +1.78 strike differential/min @distance vs +0.56
Muhammad proj. +21.7 significant strikes attempted
Bonfim proj. +4.0 significant strikes landed
Muhammad proj. +9.8 head strikes landed
Bonfim proj. 0.42 knockdowns vs 0.20
Bonfim proj. 3.5 takedowns landed (10.9 attempts) vs 3.0 (9.9 attempts)
Bonfim has 14:4 takedown ratio, he spent 24% of fight time in control, 10% being controlled
Muhammad has 46:5 takedown ratio, he spent 24% of fight time in control, 6% being controlled
Bonfim proj. 2.33 submission attempts vs 0.17
Bonfim has 5:0 submission attempt ratio (60% secured, 0% conceded)
Muhammad has 3:1 submission attempt ratio (33% secured, 0% conceded)
Bonfim proj. 44.2% finish chance vs 12.5% and 43.3% decision
Good upside on Bonfim via submission (via decision is safer play)
Bonfim is much younger, will likely win striking and grappling, and is 3.5x more likely to get finish

posts.content:
Predictions: 4 of 4 Pending
|
Tied for 1st with 510 others

Brendan Allen vs Edmen Shahbazyan
Pick: Allen via round 2 submission
79% of Tapology users (14 users) are picking Allen (64% submission)
Shahbazyan is 1.9 years younger (28.6 vs 30.5)
Both fighters have 75” reach
Shahbazyan has +0.20 strike differential/min vs -0.03
Shahbazyan proj. +6.9 significant strikes attempted
Shahbazyan proj. +1.9 significant strikes landed
Shahbazyan proj. +5.2 head strikes landed
Shahbazyan proj. 0.61 knockdowns vs 0.13
Shahbazyan proj. 1.8 takedowns landed (4.4 attempts) vs 1.4 (3.7 attempts)
Allen has 22:19 takedown ratio, he spent 29% of fight time in control, 23% being controlled
Shahbazyan has 12:18 takedown ratio, he spent 19% of fight time in control, 23% being controlled
Allen proj. 1.10 submission attempts vs 0.40
Allen proj. 39.8% finish chance vs 37.9% and 22.3% decision
Projected rounds: 1.9 (9.5 mins)
Allen has 14:1 submission win/loss ratio (6/14 in round 1, 5/14 in round 2)
Shahbazyan has 1:1 submission win/loss ratio (only time subbed was in round 2 vs Gerald Meerschaert)
Shahbazyan not projected to win striking by enough
Allen will likely win grappling
Allen via submission is safer play on Tapology
Shahbazyan is a good play if he is significant betting favorite

posts.content: I hope Evloev vs Murphy this weekend, the two rightful contender fighting each other its an absolutely classic between the two the very best of the divison, to the point whatever scheme Jean Silva struck with the UFC becomes irrelevant and the winner gets his rightful shot at title, its time to legimatize meritocracy and meaningful fights, these days the match-ups seem to be strongly pushing to heavy favorites against undeserving contenders/prospects, and that is not why we learned to love the UFC product.
